description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that composes its configuration from several local include files: .gitlab/ci/defaults.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/stages.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/workflow-rules.yml, .gitlab/ci/build-images.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/misc-images.gitlab-ci.yml, and .gitlab/ci/qa.gitlab-ci.yml. Additionally, include .gitlab/ci/gitlab-com.gitlab-ci.yml only when the runner is on gitlab.com (CI_SERVER_HOST == "gitlab.com"). The pipeline relies on the included files to define stages, jobs, Docker images, caches, and deployment rules. Ensure the conditional include is evaluated at pipeline creation time. No direct jobs are defined in this file.
